questions.question: Describe the key differences between Black Box Testing, White Box Testing, and Gray Box Testing. How do these testing methods cater to the unique needs of different software projects? (10 marks)
What are the primary benefits of adopting Agile Methodology in software development? Provide at least two (2) practical examples of how Agile can improve the testing process. (15 marks)
Compare and contrast Unit Testing and Integration Testing. Which testing method is more suitable for testing complex software systems? Provide reasons to support your answer. (8 marks)
